form.formComment: At debut, sat on the speed throughout before fading second last of 8 at Cranbourne 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 5 len behind Sunbliss with 58kg at $7. Knocked up late after travelling wide on debut but had trialled well prior so maybe forgive that run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). At debut, sat on the speed throughout before fading second last of 8 at Cranbourne 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 5 len behind Sunbliss with 58kg at $7. Knocked up late after travelling wide on debut but had trialled well prior so maybe forgive that run.

form.formComment: Colt by Admire Mars on debut. Won a Camperdown jump-out on March 16. Nice all-the-way win in 1000m Camperdown jumpout, which should have him ready for this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Colt by Admire Mars on debut. Won a Camperdown jump-out on March 16. Nice all-the-way win in 1000m Camperdown jumpout, which should have him ready for this.

form.formComment: Trent Busuttin & Natalie Young trained two-year-old gelding lining up for debut and was purchased for NZD $ 130,000 (NZB 2025 Ready to Run Sale). Scored in a recent Caulfield Heath trial. Good draw will assist chances. Recent Caulfield trial win was only narrow, but plenty of merit after sitting three-wide throughout and still finishing off strongly.

formComments.title: TAB

Recent Caulfield trial win was only narrow, but plenty of merit after sitting three-wide throughout and still finishing off strongly.

form.formComment: Gelding by Finance Tycoon on debut. Ran 3rd in a Camperdown jump-out on March 30. Travelled wide throughout in latest jumpout, so effort better than it looked and might pay to watch market.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Finance Tycoon on debut. Ran 3rd in a Camperdown jump-out on March 30. Travelled wide throughout in latest jumpout, so effort better than it looked and might pay to watch market.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Pakenham 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, slow going 1.0 len behind Chapados with 58kg at $16. Second run from a spell 5th of 8 at Pakenham 2yo Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1200m, slow going 3.5 len behind Profligate with 58kg at $2.80. Has experience on all rivals here and should be at peak fitness third-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover for the majority of the event.
